auth.auth_id_intro: Enter your email address to register or login
auth.token_check_email: We sent you a login link. Check your email and click the link to log in.
auth.token_different_device: It seems the login was started on a different device. Please go back and enter your email again.
auth.token_expired: This code has expired. Please request a new one.
auth.token_invalid: The code is invalid. Please try again.
auth.token_invalid_link: Hmm that link in the email didn't look right. Please enter the code in the message.
auth.token_unknown_error: Something went wrong. Please try again later.
auth.unknown_error: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

share.community_text: {publicName} runs a community — check it out

emails.fallback_hint: If the button doesn't work, copy and paste this URL:

login_link.contentBody: Click the button below to log in.
login_link.footer: If you didn't request this, you can ignore this email.
login_link.subject: Your login link

new_like.contentBody: Hey there, someone smiled at you.
new_like.subject: Someone smiled at you

new_match.contentBody: Hey there, you and {name} smiled at each other.
new_match.subject: You smiled at each other!

new_message.contentBody: Hey there, you have a new message from {sender}: {message}
new_message.subject: You have a new message

onboarding_reminder.contentBody: Hey there, you started setting up your profile on {siteName} but haven't finished yet. Did you change your mind or had some trouble? If you need any help, feel free to reply to this email.
onboarding_reminder.subject: Forgot your profile?

share.event_text: {publicName} is hosting an event — check it out

interactions.anonymous_like_explanation: They won't know who sent it until they smile back at you.
interactions.anonymous_toggle_question: Let them see who sent it?
interactions.like_error: Oops, this didn't work. Please try again.
interactions.revealed_like_explanation: They will see who sent it.

matches.anonymous_like_hint: They smiled at you anonymously, at least for now. You'll find out who when you smile back. You can bump into them on the map — if you see someone marked like this, your preferences match.

notifications.you_have_likes: {count, plural, one {Someone smiled at you} other {# people smiled at you}}

pass_confirm_dialog.question_liked: You already smiled at them. Are you sure you want to pass?
pass_confirm_dialog.question_matched: You smiled at each other. Do you REALLY want to unmatch?
pass_confirm_dialog.title: But wait...

matches.received_likes: {count, plural, =0 {No smiles yet.} one {You have # smile.} other {You have # smiles!}}

messaging.already_sent_waiting: You have already sent them a message. Once they answer, you can continue the conversation.
messaging.no_messages_placeholder: Your conversations will take place here.

onboarding.age_subtitle: I've been on this planet since

confirmation.browse_hint: See who else is on here
confirmation.title: All set!

onboarding.dating_intro_hint: Leave this empty if you want to fill this in later.
onboarding.dating_intro_placeholder: Tell a bit about the kind of relationship you are looking for
onboarding.dating_mode_step_hint_active: In the next few steps, please reveal a few additional details about yourself, and your preferences on who you would like to meet.  Those details will be visible only to other people in dating mode who match your preferences.
onboarding.dating_mode_step_hint_inactive: You can always enable or disable dating mode later from your profile.
onboarding.dating_mode_step_title: Would you also like to use dating mode?
onboarding.interests_hint: Start typing to search for tags. You can add new tags if you don't find what you're looking for.
onboarding.interests_popular_heading: What other people here are into:
onboarding.languages_subtitle: Select the languages you speak to help others connect with you.
onboarding.location_hint: Start typing your city or village, and select from the list.
onboarding.social_intro_hint: Leave this empty if you want to fill this in later.
onboarding.social_intro_subtitle: Tell a bit about yourself to help others get to know you.
onboarding.welcome_subtitle: Please fill in some info about yourself. You can always change this later.

wizard.appear_message: You will now appear to people who are looking for the same things as you. You can always change this info later.
wizard.dating_intro_text: This is the first time you are using the Dating Mode, please fill out a couple of things about yourself so that other users can get to know you. You can always edit this information later in your profile settings.

messages.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this post?

placeholders.content: Share what you're offering or looking for

blocklist.dialog_message_1: If this person is bothering you, you can block them. This will prevent them from sending you messages or interacting with your profile. They will also not be shown to you anywhere on this site, as if they never existed.
blocklist.dialog_message_2: They will not receive any notification that you have blocked them.

browse.no_results_cta_title: It's a bit lonely here. Invite a friend?

forms.city_start_typing: Start typing to search for your city
forms.dating_mode_toggle_hint: To protect the privacy of other people (and yours) you can only change this setting once a day.
forms.dating_mode_view_hint_active: This is what other people with whom your preferences mutually match will see.
forms.introtext_multilang_hint: You can write your intro text in multiple languages. Other people will see the version in their preferred language, or the default if their language isn't available.
forms.intro_who_placeholder: Who would you like to meet?

image_upload.add_from_phone: Add a photo from your phone

errors.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.

image_upload.take_photo: Or take a photo with your camera
image_upload.title: Add a photo

settings.calls_opt_in_hint: You can disable this on a per-member basis as well. Uncheck this if you're not interested in using this at all.
settings.newsletter_opt_in_hint: Community updates, new features, that kind of stuff. You can unsubscribe any time.
settings.notifications_opt_in: When someone messages me, smiles at me, or matches with me...
settings.title: Settings

connection_error.description: Apologies for the interruption.  The Machine Elves need a few seconds to sort things out, we'll be back in a bit.
connection_error.title: It's not you, it's us.

install_banner.message: Install this app on your device.

unsubscribe.already_body: You no longer receive notification emails from us.
unsubscribe.confirm_body: You won't receive any more notification emails. You can still log in and update your preferences at any time.
unsubscribe.done_body: You won't receive further notification emails from us.
unsubscribe.error_body: This unsubscribe link is invalid or has expired. Please log in to manage your email preferences.

actions.clipboard_unsupported: Your browser does not support copying to the clipboard
